name: playwright-browser-testing
description: Repo-local Codex plugin that exposes the official Playwright MCP server for browser testing.

interface.shortDescription: Open and test the app in a real browser through Playwright MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds the official Playwright MCP server to this workspace so Codex can open the app, interact with flows, and validate UI changes in a real browser session.
defaultPrompt: Open the local app in the browser and smoke test the main flow.
Check the compass page in a real browser after UI changes.
Verify the goals flow end to end with Playwright MCP.
